name: @mindfoldhq/oh-my-openclaw
description: Inject assigned inbox task context into target OpenClaw agents

scripts.release: pnpm prerelease && npm version patch && pnpm format && git add -A && git commit --amend --no-edit && git push && git push --tags && npm publish --access public
scripts.release:minor: pnpm prerelease && npm version minor && pnpm format && git add -A && git commit --amend --no-edit && git push && git push --tags && npm publish --access public
scripts.release:major: pnpm prerelease && npm version major && pnpm format && git add -A && git commit --amend --no-edit && git push && git push --tags && npm publish --access public
